phases.description: Project scaffold, infrastructure adapters, cross-cutting concerns

tasks.title: Event Contract base class
tasks.detail: BaseEvent with eventId, correlationId, tenantId, source, version, occurredAt

phases.title: Platform BC

tasks.note: FeatureGuard already wired in p1; Platform BC provides check-feature service it delegates to

tasks.title: problem-reports + integrations slices

phases.title: Bookings BC
phases.description: Core domain — scheduling, waitlist, groups — يبدأ بعد p4+p5+p7
phases.parallelNote: t1→t2 متتابعة (أساس). t3+t4+t5 متوازية بعد t2. t6 مستقلة. t7+t8 متوازية. t9 في النهاية.

tasks.title: Booking schema + check-availability slice
tasks.detail: Complex: considers clinic hours, employee schedule, existing bookings

tasks.title: create-booking slice
tasks.detail: CreateBookingCommand + handler. Emits BookingConfirmedEvent

tasks.title: cancel-booking slice
tasks.detail: CancelBookingCommand. Emits BookingCancelledEvent

tasks.title: reschedule-booking slice
tasks.detail: Validates new slot availability, updates booking

tasks.title: confirm-booking slice
tasks.detail: Manual confirmation by receptionist

tasks.title: get-booking + list-bookings slices
tasks.detail: Read queries — مستقلة تبدأ مع t1

tasks.title: waitlist schema + add/promote slices
tasks.detail: Waitlist schema + add-to-waitlist + promote-from-waitlist. Auto-promote on cancellation

tasks.title: create-group-session + enroll-in-group slices
tasks.detail: Capacity management, enrollment rules

tasks.title: Booking event handlers
tasks.detail: on-payment-completed updates booking status

phases.title: Bookings BC — Critical Fixes
phases.description: ثغرات حرجة في check-availability و create-booking. الـ schema الحالي لا يدعم نموذج وقت الموظف الحقيقي (فترتين في اليوم + يوم off أسبوعي + إجازة سنوية ممتدة) — يحتاج migration واحد.

tasks.title: Migration: توسيع EmployeeAvailability + EmployeeAvailabilityException
tasks.detail: نموذج وقت الموظف الحقيقي: (1) فترات متعددة في اليوم (9-1 ثم 4-9) — إزالة @@unique([employeeId, dayOfWeek]) من EmployeeAvailability. (2) يوم off أسبوعي = غياب أي صف لذلك dayOfWeek. (3) إجازة سنوية ممتدة — تحويل EmployeeAvailabilityException من date مفرد إلى نطاق (startDate, endDate) وحذف startTime/endTime (تنظيف).

tasks.title: إصلاح check-availability — دعم فترات متعددة + exceptions + holidays
tasks.detail: CheckAvailabilityHandler يتجاهل EmployeeAvailability حالياً. بعد p9-t0: (1) جلب كل shifts اليوم من EmployeeAvailability (قد تكون فترتين)، (2) التحقق من EmployeeAvailabilityException كنطاق تاريخي للإجازات، (3) Holiday على البرانش، (4) توليد slots ضمن كل نافذة منفصلة (الاستراحة = فجوة بين الفترات). يعتمد على p9-t0.

tasks.title: إصلاح create-booking — منع قبول price/duration من الـ caller
tasks.detail: CreateBookingHandler يقبل price و durationMins من الـ DTO مباشرة — ثغرة تجارية. مؤقتاً: جلب القيم من Service model والتحقق من تطابقها. سيُستبدل بـ PriceResolver الكامل في p11.

tasks.title: إصلاح create-booking — التحقق من EmployeeService
tasks.detail: CreateBookingHandler لا يتحقق من أن الموظف يقدم الخدمة المطلوبة. يجب التحقق من EmployeeService (موجود في schema). أيضاً: التحقق من أن employeeId و serviceId ينتميان لنفس الـ tenantId.

phases.title: Ops BC
phases.description: Cron jobs, activity log, reports, health — يبدأ بعد p8
phases.parallelNote: t1+t2+t4 متوازية. t3 (reports) مستقلة تبدأ بالتوازي بعد p8.

tasks.title: Cron task slices (5 jobs + refresh-token cleanup)
tasks.detail: booking-autocomplete, booking-expiry, booking-noshow, appointment-reminders, group-session-automation. PRIORITY: add refresh-token-cleanup job — deletes expired/revoked tokens older than 30d. Without it, RefreshTokenHandler does O(n) bcrypt compare across all tokens ever issued per user, degrading login refresh to seconds at scale.
tasks.priorityNote: refresh-token-cleanup is HIGH priority — performance impact is proportional to uncleared token accumulation

tasks.title: log-activity slice
tasks.detail: Audit trail — logs all mutations from all BCs via event subscription

tasks.title: generate-report slice
tasks.detail: Revenue reports, activity reports, exports (PDF/Excel)

tasks.title: health-check slice
tasks.detail: Terminus health checks: DB, Redis, BullMQ, MinIO

phases.title: Services BC — Pricing & Catalog
phases.description: منظومة الخدمات الكاملة: أقسام، تصنيفات، خيارات مدة per booking type، ربط موظفين مع override، PriceResolver — مرحلة مستقلة جديدة تبدأ بعد p9
phases.parallelNote: t1→t2→t3+t4 متتابعة ثم متوازية. t5 تتبع t3+t4.

tasks.title: Department + ServiceCategory schema + migration
tasks.detail: model Department { tenantId, nameAr, nameEn, isVisible (false = يخفي القسم ويعرض الفئات مباشرة), sortOrder, isActive }. model ServiceCategory { tenantId, departmentId (nullable), nameAr, nameEn, sortOrder, isActive }. تعديل model Service لإضافة categoryId FK + migration.
tasks.note: migration 20260411232519_p11_t1_departments_categories. ملاحظة: Prisma diff حاولت DROP INDEX للـ ivfflat — أُزيل السطر يدوياً مع تعليق توضيحي.

tasks.title: ServiceDurationOption schema + migration
tasks.detail: model ServiceDurationOption { tenantId, serviceId, bookingType (nullable = ينطبق على كل الأنواع), label, labelAr, durationMins, price, currency, isDefault, sortOrder }. bookingType nullable يعطي مرونة: خيار لنوع حجز معين أو لكل الأنواع.
tasks.note: migration 20260411234226_p11_t2_service_duration_options. FK serviceId Cascade, indexes (tenantId), (serviceId), (serviceId, bookingType). DROP INDEX for ivfflat removed manually from generated SQL — pgvector index preserved via prisma:hooks.

tasks.title: EmployeeServiceOption schema + migration + PriceResolverService
tasks.detail: model EmployeeServiceOption { tenantId, employeeServiceId (FK to EmployeeService), durationOptionId (FK to ServiceDurationOption), priceOverride (nullable), durationOverride (nullable), isActive }. PriceResolverService: (1) EmployeeServiceOption.priceOverride/durationOverride → (2) ServiceDurationOption.price/durationMins → (3) Service.price/durationMins.

tasks.title: Department + ServiceCategory CRUD slices
tasks.detail: create/update/list/archive لكل من Department و ServiceCategory. toggle-department-visibility slice. set-duration-options slice (إضافة/حذف/تعديل خيارات المدة لخدمة). set-employee-service-options slice (override الموظف per خيار مدة).

tasks.title: ربط PriceResolver بـ create-booking + تحديث check-availability
tasks.detail: create-booking يستدعي PriceResolverService بدل قبول price/duration من الـ caller — يُكمل الإصلاح المؤقت من p9-t2. check-availability يقرأ ServiceDurationOption المتاحة per booking type ويعرض السلوتات per-option.

phases.title: Bookings BC — Status Log + Settings
phases.description: BookingStatusLog audit trail + BookingSettings per-branch — كانا في النظام القديم ولم يُنقلا. يبدأ بعد p9 متوازياً مع p11.
phases.parallelNote: p12 متوازية مع p11. داخلياً: t1+t4 متوازيتان أولاً، ثم t2+t3+t5 متوازيات.

tasks.title: BookingStatusLog schema + migration
tasks.detail: model BookingStatusLog { tenantId, bookingId, fromStatus (nullable), toStatus, changedBy (userId | 'system'), reason (nullable), createdAt }. index على (bookingId) و (tenantId, createdAt).

tasks.title: تسجيل الـ log في كل status transition
tasks.detail: كل handler يغير status (confirm, cancel, check-in, complete, no-show, expire) يكتب BookingStatusLog entry داخل نفس الـ transaction. changedBy يُقرأ من RequestContext.

tasks.title: list-booking-status-log slice
tasks.detail: ListBookingStatusLogQuery — يُستخدم في dashboard لعرض تاريخ الحجز.

tasks.title: BookingSettings schema + migration
tasks.detail: model BookingSettings { tenantId, branchId (nullable = global default). الحقول: bufferMinutes, freeCancelBeforeHours, freeCancelRefundType (FULL|PARTIAL|NONE), lateCancelRefundPercent, maxReschedulesPerBooking, autoCompleteAfterHours, autoNoShowAfterMinutes, minBookingLeadMinutes, maxAdvanceBookingDays, waitlistEnabled, waitlistMaxPerSlot }. partial unique index لضمان singleton per scope.

tasks.title: upsert-booking-settings + get-booking-settings + تطبيقها في الـ handlers
tasks.detail: Resolution: branch row ?? global row. تطبيق في: check-availability (bufferMinutes, minBookingLeadMinutes, maxAdvanceBookingDays)، cancel-booking (freeCancelBeforeHours, refundType)، reschedule-booking (maxReschedulesPerBooking).

phases.title: Bookings BC — Recurring
phases.description: حجوزات فردية متكررة بأنماط مختلفة — كانت في النظام القديم ولم تُنقل. تبدأ بعد p11.

tasks.title: recurringGroupId + recurringPattern في Booking schema
tasks.detail: migration: إضافة recurringGroupId (String?) و recurringPattern (enum: DAILY, EVERY_2_DAYS, WEEKLY, BIWEEKLY, MONTHLY) إلى model Booking. index على recurringGroupId.

tasks.title: create-recurring-booking slice
tasks.detail: CreateRecurringBookingCommand: يولد مجموعة حجوزات بـ recurringGroupId مشترك. يتحقق من availability لكل موعد. يستدعي PriceResolver لكل حجز. يدعم: DAILY, EVERY_2_DAYS, WEEKLY, BIWEEKLY, MONTHLY (مع clamp لنهاية الشهر). maxRecurrences من BookingSettings.

phases.title: Comms BC
phases.description: All outbound communication — متوازية مع p11+p12+p13
phases.parallelNote: p14 كلها متوازية مع p11-p13. داخلياً: t1→t2+t3+t4 ثم t5.

tasks.title: send-push + send-email + send-sms slices
tasks.detail: Core communication commands. Each wraps its infrastructure adapter
tasks.note: Delivered in commit 6c199a37 + fixes bc02f3fb/682b810e/08ea0085. 4 slices in modules/comms/ (send-push, send-sms, send-email, send-notification aggregator). Tests in comms.handler.spec.ts.

tasks.title: notifications slice
tasks.detail: In-app notification entity: create, list, mark-read. FCM push via send-push
tasks.note: Delivered in commit 51ad759f. 3 handlers in modules/comms/notifications/ (create, list, mark-read) with unreadOnly filter and optional notificationId for single-record marking.

tasks.title: create-chat-message + list-conversations slices
tasks.detail: In-app messaging between client and clinic
tasks.note: Delivered in commit 91bb71c0. 3 handlers in modules/comms/chat/ (create-conversation with dedup + AI chat support, create-chat-message updating lastMessageAt, list-conversations with most-recent-message include).

tasks.title: email-templates CRUD slices
tasks.detail: Editable templates with variable substitution
tasks.note: Delivered in commit 295fdc06. 4 handlers in modules/comms/email-templates/ (create/update/get/list) + dedicated email-templates.handler.spec.ts (9/9 passing). DTO uses subjectAr + subjectEn? to match schema. Wired in CommsModule (commit ae5c6ceb).

tasks.title: Comms event handlers
tasks.detail: on-booking-cancelled, on-reminder-due, on-payment-failed, on-client-enrolled
tasks.note: Delivered in commit 1fabb105. 4 handlers in modules/comms/events/ (on-booking-cancelled, on-booking-reminder, on-payment-failed, on-client-enrolled) + comms.events.handler.spec.ts. Registered via CommsModule.onModuleInit() in commit ae5c6ceb.
